hub.description: Hub core — routes inbound messages, dispatches to voice/LLM/image/clipool workers. Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.hub.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant.

telegram-adapter.description: Telegram bot adapter — inbox narrowed to _INBOX.telegram-adapter.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant.

discord-adapter.description: Discord bot adapter — inbox narrowed to _INBOX.discord-adapter.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant.

tts-adapter.description: Lyra-side TTS voice satellite (retired in #690 cutover). Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.tts-adapter.> and _inbox.tts-adapter.> per ADR-051; both case variants retained for nats-py case-sensitivity compatibility.

stt-adapter.description: Lyra-side STT voice satellite (retired in #690 cutover). Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.stt-adapter.> and _inbox.stt-adapter.> per ADR-051; both case variants retained for nats-py case-sensitivity compatibility.

voice-tts.description: voicecli nats-serve TTS worker on Machine 1 (#689). Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.voice-tts.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant; both case variants retained for nats-py case-sensitivity compatibility.

voice-stt.description: voicecli nats-serve STT worker on Machine 1 (#689). Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.voice-stt.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant; both case variants retained for nats-py case-sensitivity compatibility.

llm-worker.description: Reserved LLM worker identity — publishes health status, subscribes to LLM request queue.

image-worker.description: imagecli nats-serve satellite (ADR-050, imageCLI#50 + #754). _INBOX.>/_inbox.> defensively included for reply-path robustness, mirroring voice-tts/voice-stt — allow_responses alone may not cover every nats-server version's reply publish path. Inbox narrowing to _INBOX.image-worker.> is sequenced behind the imageCLI connect-site PR per ADR-047 rule 4.

monitor.description: Monitoring identity — full pub+sub on lyra.monitor.> namespace.

clipool-worker.description: CliPool NATS worker — receives claude subprocess dispatch commands from hub, publishes heartbeat. Inbox narrowed to _INBOX.clipool-worker.> per ADR-051 per-identity prefix invariant.
